rationale: Gov't Code §420.003 defines terms for the sexual assault evidence and crime laboratory chapter. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: "Sexual assault" means any act or attempted act as described by Section 21.02, 21.11, 22.011, 22.021, or 25.02, Penal Code.
_note: The cited rule governs sexual assault program definitions and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions; no conflict exists.
